summary: v1.1 must remain compatible with bare event rows; missing schema_version should mean v1.
Unknown extension fields must be allowed because packet 080 already emits fields beyond the formal v1 schema.
Append-only means v1.1 emitters may add version metadata to new records but must not rewrite old state lines.
Deep-research and deep-review reducer parsers support the tolerant-reader model: parse valid JSONL lines, surface corruption warnings, and preserve backward-compatible record handling.
Do not require a new type discriminator or mandatory schema_version for all council rows in v1.1; that would break existing packet 080 artifacts.
